blocks.content: It was a girl from Millhaven who lit the fuse. She'd seen the photo on Facebook — Kit and Cassidy at the party, her hand on his arm mid-conversation, both of them laughing at something.
She texted Daisy on a Tuesday afternoon.
hey!! saw something on FB thought you should see
The photo came through a second later. Daisy looked at it for a long time.
isn't that kit? who's the girl lol
She put the phone face-down on her desk. Picked it back up. Looked at the photo again. Cassidy's hand on his arm. His face turned toward her, grinning at something.
someone sent me a photo. from the party friday
you and cassidy. becca hensley saw it on facebook
it's not what it looks like
